papers.title: A Comprehensive Survey on Agent Skills: Taxonomy, Techniques, and Applications
papers.authors: Yingli Zhou, Wang Shu, Yaodong Su, et al.
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents that reason, plan, and act through tools, memory, and structured interaction are emerging as a promising paradigm. This survey examines this challenge through agent skills, defined as reusable procedural artifacts. Literature organized around four stages: representation, acquisition, retrieval, and evolution.
papers.key_contribution: 首个系统梳理agent skill完整生命周期（表示-获取-检索-演化）的综述
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：工作流自动化方法论相关

papers.title: Agent Skills for LLMs: Architecture, Acquisition, Security, and the Path Forward
papers.authors: Renjun Xu, Yang Yan
papers.abstract: Comprehensive survey organized along four axes: architectural foundations (SKILL.md, progressive context loading, MCP); skill acquisition (RL, autonomous discovery, compositional synthesis); deployment at scale; and security (26.1% community skills contain vulnerabilities).
papers.key_contribution: 全面覆盖skill生态技术栈和安全问题，提出Skill Trust框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：SKILL.md规范和MCP协议直接相关

papers.title: EvoDS: Self-Evolving Autonomous Data Science Agent with Skill Learning
papers.authors: Zherui Yang, Fan Liu, Yansong Ning, Hao Liu
papers.abstract: Self-evolving data science agent with Autonomous Skill Acquisition (ASA) and Adaptive Context Compression (ACC) via agentic RL. Outperforms SOTA by 28.9% across four benchmarks. Proves hierarchical design reduces tool-selection error.
papers.key_contribution: 证明agent可以通过RL自主合成验证复用技能
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：科学工作流自动化与optics_agent目标一致

papers.title: SkillEvolBench: Benchmarking Episodic Experience to Procedural Skills Evolution
papers.authors: Yingtie Lei, Zhongwei Wan, Jiankun Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: 180 tasks across six agent environments. Key finding: current agents rarely form robust reusable skills; raw-trajectory reuse outperforms distilled skills, suggesting current abstraction discards procedural cues.
papers.key_contribution: 揭示关键发现：蒸馏技能不如原始轨迹复用
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：benchmark方法论可直接用于optics_agent评估

papers.title: Automating Skill Acquisition through Mining Open-Source Agentic Repositories
papers.authors: Shuzhen Bi, Mengsong Wu, Hao Hao, et al.
papers.abstract: Systematic framework for automated acquisition of agent skills through mining GitHub repos. Includes structural analysis, semantic skill identification, and SKILL.md format translation. Agent-generated content achieves 40% gains in knowledge transfer.
papers.key_contribution: GitHub技能挖掘pipeline，验证SKILL.md标准化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：方法论可参考，领域偏教育可视化

papers.title: SkillCraft: Can LLM Agents Learn to Use Tools Skillfully?
papers.authors: Shiqi Chen, Jingze Gai, Ruochen Zhou, et al.
papers.abstract: Benchmark for compositional tool-use skills. Token usage reduced by up to 80% via skill saving/reuse. Success rate strongly correlates with tool composition ability.
papers.key_contribution: skill保存复用减少80% token消耗
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：高效复用方法论可参考

papers.title: Agent Skill Acquisition via CycleQD
papers.authors: So Kuroki, Taishi Nakamura, Takuya Akiba, Yujin Tang
papers.abstract: Uses Quality Diversity framework with cyclic adaptation, model merging crossover, and SVD-based mutation. LLAMA3-8B matches GPT-3.5-TURBO on AgentBench while retaining language capabilities.
papers.key_contribution: 质量多样性框架实现多技能联合获取
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：偏向通用LLM训练

papers.title: Bootstrap Your Own Skills (BOSS)
papers.authors: Jesse Zhang, Jiahui Zhang, Karl Pertsch, et al.
papers.abstract: LLM-guided skill bootstrapping for long-horizon tasks. Agent with primitive skills practices new skills without reward feedback. Outperforms unsupervised methods on zero-shot execution.
papers.key_contribution: LLM指导skill自举，无需奖励信号
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 低：面向机器人，方法论可参考

papers.title: TRACE: Test-time Rule Acquisition and Compiled Enforcement
papers.authors: Yujun Zhou, Kehan Guo, Haomin Zhuang, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill-layer pipeline mining user corrections, rewriting as atomic rules, compiling into runtime checks. Reduces violation from 100% to 37.6% (in-distribution) and 2.0% (out-of-distribution).
papers.key_contribution: 用户纠错→规则编译→运行时检查pipeline
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：用户反馈编译为规则的方法可直接应用

papers.title: Plan Before Search: Search Agents Need Plan
papers.authors: Zhipeng Qian, Zihan Liang, Yufei Ma, et al.
papers.abstract: Studies sub-skill dependency structure in retrieval agents. Identical reward induces qualitatively different RL failure modes across model scales. Self-bootstrapping paradigm eliminates need for external distillation.
papers.key_contribution: 子技能依赖结构和模型-specific RL失败模式
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：sub-skill dependency分析可参考

papers.title: S1-DeepResearch: Long-Horizon Research Agents
papers.authors: Yao Dong, Xinglin Xiao, Liwei Dong, et al.
papers.abstract: Unified trajectory construction for deep research agents. Graph-grounded formulation, agentic rollout, multi-dimensional verification. SOTA among open-source 32B models across 20 benchmarks.
papers.key_contribution: 统一deep research agent轨迹构建框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：长周期研究自动化架构可参考

papers.title: SADE: Symptom-Aware Diagnostic Escalation
papers.authors: Kuan-Hao Tseng, Niruth Bogahawatta, Yasod Ginige, et al.
papers.abstract: Encodes Cisco troubleshooting methodology as explicit policy with phase-gated workflow and routed fault-family skills library. 37 pp F1 improvement over ReAct+GPT-5 on NIKA benchmark.
papers.key_contribution: 领域专家方法论→显式策略+技能库的编码
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：直接适用于COMSOL工作流skill编码

papers.title: NORA: Harness-Engineered Autonomous Research Agent for Spatial Data Science
papers.authors: Bing Zhou, Xiao Huang, Huan Ning, et al.
papers.abstract: Skills-first architecture with 21 domain workflow skills, 9 specialist sub-agents, custom MCP servers. Formalizes harness engineering: lifecycle hooks, safety gates, human-in-the-loop.
papers.key_contribution: 首个skills-first科学领域agent系统
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：skills-first架构设计直接相关

papers.title: STEM Agent: Self-adapting, Tool-enabled, Extensible Multi-agent Architecture
papers.authors: Alfred Shen, Aaron Shen
papers.abstract: Biologically inspired architecture where undifferentiated agent core differentiates into specialized handlers. Skills crystallize from recurring interaction patterns through maturation lifecycle analogous to cell differentiation.
papers.key_contribution: 生物启发的skill成熟生命周期模型
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：技能成熟度模型值得借鉴

papers.title: Strategist: Self-improvement via Bi-Level Tree Search
papers.authors: Jonathan Light, Min Cai, Weiqin Chen, et al.
papers.abstract: LLMs search/update high-level strategies refined by low-level MCTS. Population-based self-play without training data. Outperforms RL methods in competitive games.
papers.key_contribution: LLM+MCTS双层优化，无需训练数据
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 低：面向博弈场景

papers.title: ImplicitMemBench: Unconscious Behavioral Adaptation in LLMs
papers.authors: Chonghan Qin, Xiachong Feng, Weitao Ma, et al.
papers.abstract: Evaluates implicit memory through Procedural Memory (one-shot skill acquisition), Priming, and Classical Conditioning. No model exceeds 66%, top performers far below human baselines.
papers.key_contribution: 首次评估LLM内隐记忆
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：内隐记忆评估有参考价值

papers.title: Compositional Skill Routing: Decompose, Retrieve, and Compose
papers.authors: Xueping Gao
papers.abstract: Formalizes Compositional Skill Routing. SkillWeaver combines LLM decomposer, bi-encoder retriever, DAG planner. Task decomposition identified as primary bottleneck (34.2% category recall). SAD improves to 67.7%.
papers.key_contribution: 形式化定义compositional skill routing，揭示分解是瓶颈
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：直接适用于COMSOL多物理场工作流编排

papers.title: Not All Skills Help: Measuring and Repairing Agent Knowledge (ASSAY)
papers.authors: Yixuan Wang, Yiyang Zhou, Yiming Liang, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill libraries exhibit causal heterogeneity: skills help on some types, hurt on others, effects cancel in aggregate. ASSAY separates generation from curation, computes per-skill causal attribution. DeepSeek-V3 reaches 69.3% (+47.4%) on AppWorld hardest split.
papers.key_contribution: skill因果异质性+因果归因筛选方法
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：可直接用于optics_agent技能质量评估

papers.title: SkillAxe: Evaluation-Guided Self-Refinement of Agent Skills
papers.authors: Srishti Gautam, Arjun Radhakrishna, Sumit Gulwani
papers.abstract: LLMs iteratively diagnose/refine own skills. Four interpretable dimensions: quality impact, trigger precision, instruction compliance, solution-path coverage. 28% relative improvement over unimproved skills, closes 47-67% gap to human.
papers.key_contribution: 四维度skill质量评估框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：skill自优化可参考

papers.title: FederatedSkill: Federated Learning for Agentic Skill Evolution
papers.authors: Jingbo Yang, Guanyu Yao, Yang Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: Privacy-preserving collaborative agent evolution using semantic skill diffs. Server models client-specific capability boundaries. Up to 44.4% success rate increase, 37.5% cost reduction.
papers.key_contribution: 联邦学习下协作skill演化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：多用户协作场景可参考

papers.title: MASA: Model-Aware Skill Alignment
papers.authors: Jianxiang Yu, Jiapeng Zhu, Bochen Lin, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill effectiveness is strongly model-dependent. MASA adapts skills per backbone via hierarchical evolution (hill climbing+UCB tree search) and lightweight rewriter. Gains up to 25.8 points.
papers.key_contribution: 首次证明skill效果模型特异性
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：直接影响optics_agent系统设计

papers.title: HiSME: Hierarchical Skill Meta-Evolving
papers.authors: Xujun Li, Kehan Zheng, Mingyuan Zhao, et al.
papers.abstract: Test-time refinement of the skill evolving framework itself. Jointly optimizes skills AND evolving strategy by learning meta-skills from execution traces.
papers.key_contribution: 元演化：优化skill演化策略本身
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：元演化可用于持续改进机制设计

papers.title: Maestro: RL Orchestration of Hierarchical Model-Skill Ensembles
papers.authors: Jinyang Wu, Guocheng Zhai, Ruihan Jin, et al.
papers.abstract: RL-driven orchestration over hierarchical model-skill registry. 4B orchestrator surpasses GPT-5 (70.1% vs 69.3%). Generalizes to unseen models without retraining.
papers.key_contribution: RL编排专家模型+skill的层次化架构
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：轻量级orchestrator架构有启发性

papers.title: HASP: Harnessing LLM Agents with Skill Programs
papers.authors: Hongjun Liu, Yifei Ming, Shafiq Joty, Chen Zhao
papers.abstract: Upgrades skills to executable Program Functions (PFs) as guardrails on failure-prone states. 25% improvement over ReAct. Modular: inference, post-training, or self-improvement.
papers.key_contribution: textual skill升级为可执行guardrail
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：可执行guardrail用于COMSOL流程错误检测

papers.title: SkillFlow: Flow-Driven Recursive Skill Evolution
papers.authors: Mingda Zhang, Tiesunlong Shen, Haoran Luo, et al.
papers.abstract: Tempered Trajectory Balance loss sampling proportional to reward. Transparent per-step credit assignment via jointly learned backward policy. Recursive evolution closes training-to-growth loop.
papers.key_contribution: 流匹配保留多样性编排策略
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：流程编排方法可参考

papers.title: SkillOps: Managing Skill Libraries as Software Ecosystems
papers.authors: Hongji Pu, Xinyuan Song, Liang Zhao
papers.abstract: Skill Contract representation, Hierarchical Skill Ecosystem Graph, health diagnosis across utility/compatibility/risk/validation. 79.5% ALFWorld success, +8.8 pp as standalone agent, near-zero LLM maintenance cost.
papers.key_contribution: skill库软件生态系统维护框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：skill库维护对长期运行至关重要

papers.title: SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse
papers.authors: Yongliang Miao, Ziyang Yu, Liang Zhao, et al.
papers.abstract: Four-layer skill graph (policies/strategies/procedures/primitives) with mixed-granularity retrieval. Random walk expansion over graph. Sublinear cost under sparse mismatch.
papers.key_contribution: 多层次skill粒度混合检索与演化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：多层次粒度适用于COMSOL不同抽象层级

papers.title: Dr. RTL: Autonomous RTL Optimization via Skill Learning
papers.authors: Wenji Fang, Yao Lu, Shang Liu, et al.
papers.abstract: Multi-agent framework for RTL timing optimization. Group-relative skill learning distills 47 pattern-strategy entries. 21%/17% WNS/TNS improvements, 6% area reduction over commercial tool.
papers.key_contribution: 领域特定skill获取+复用的完整案例
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：思路可直接迁移到COMSOL仿真

papers.title: SkillX: Automatically Constructing Skill Knowledge Bases
papers.authors: Chenxi Wang, Zhuoyun Yu, Xin Xie, et al.
papers.abstract: Fully automated plug-and-play skill KB. Three-tier hierarchy: strategic plans, functional skills, atomic skills. Strong backbone skills boost weaker agents.
papers.key_contribution: 跨agent可迁移的分层skill知识库
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：强弱agent技能迁移可复用

papers.title: EffiSkill: Code Efficiency Optimization via Agent Skills
papers.authors: Zimu Wang, Yuling Shi, Mengfan Li, et al.
papers.abstract: Mines Operator/Meta Skills from slow/fast program pairs. Execution-free diagnosis+skill retrieval for optimization. +3.69-12.52 pp over strongest baseline.
papers.key_contribution: 代码优化模式→可复用agent skill
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：领域差异较大

papers.title: Memento-Skills: Let Agents Design Agents
papers.authors: Huichi Zhou, Siyuan Guo, Anjie Liu, et al.
papers.abstract: Agent-designing-agent system. Structured markdown skills as persistent evolving memory via Read-Write Reflective Learning. 26.2% and 116.2% relative improvements.
papers.key_contribution: agent设计agent的闭循环
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：自设计理念有启发性

papers.title: daVinci-kernel: Co-Evolving Skill Selection, Summarization, Utilization
papers.authors: Dayuan Fu, Mohan Jiang, Tongyu Wang, et al.
papers.abstract: Three agents (selection, policy, summary) sharing LLM backbone, jointly trained via multi-turn REINFORCE. SOTA on KernelBench.
papers.key_contribution: 三agent co-evolution共享backbone
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：多agent协作可借鉴

papers.title: SkillGraph: Evolving Skill Graphs for Agents
papers.authors: Xiaoyuan Li, Moxin Li, Keqin Bao, et al.
papers.abstract: Directed graph with prerequisite/enhancement/co-occurrence edges. Retrieves ordered subgraphs. Continuously updated from trajectories+RL. SOTA on ALFWorld, WebShop, QA tasks.
papers.key_contribution: 有向技能图支持组合推理
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：适合COMSOL多物理场步骤依赖建模

papers.title: MAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution with Co-Evolutionary Knowledge Graphs
papers.authors: Ruiyi Yang, Zechen Li, Hao Xue, et al.
papers.abstract: Four-subgraph co-evolutionary knowledge graph. Experience subgraph stores corrections and success traces. Graph+bandits updated from reward stream; backbone frozen.
papers.key_contribution: 四子图共进化+frozen backbone持续学习
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：frozen backbone+图演化可参考

papers.title: SkillOS: Learning Skill Curation for Self-Evolving Agents
papers.authors: Siru Ouyang, Jun Yan, Yanfei Chen, et al.
papers.abstract: Trainable curator + frozen executor. RL training on grouped task streams with composite rewards. Curator generalizes across backbones and domains.
papers.key_contribution: 可训练skill curator (vs 启发式)
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：trainable curator模式可应用

papers.title: Decompose and Recompose for Robotic Manipulation
papers.authors: Xitie Zhang, Aming Wu, Yahong Han
papers.abstract: Atomic skill-action pairs as intermediate representation. Decompose demonstrations, recompose for unseen tasks via compositional reasoning. Zero-shot cross-task generalization.
papers.key_contribution: 原子技能-动作对的分解-重组范式
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：分解-重组范式有参考价值

papers.title: Experiential Reflective Learning (ERL) for Self-Improving LLM Agents
papers.authors: Marc-Antoine Allard, Arnaud Teinturier, Victor Xing, Gautier Viaud
papers.abstract: Reflects on trajectories to generate heuristics capturing transferable lessons. Selective retrieval essential. +7.8% on Gaia2. Heuristics more transferable than few-shot prompting.
papers.key_contribution: 轨迹→启发式的反思学习框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：可直接用于COMSOL仿真经验提炼

papers.title: GRASP: Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer
papers.authors: Johannes Moll, Jean-Philippe Corbeil, Jiazhen Pan, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill edits pass regression budget: net improvement on held-out probe. gpt-oss-120b from 40.6% to 88.8%, +21.0 points over strongest baseline. Libraries transfer across models.
papers.key_contribution: regression budget确保安全改进
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：regression budget可直接采用

papers.title: ReST meets ReAct: Self-Improvement for Multi-Step Reasoning
papers.authors: Renat Aksitov, Sobhan Miryoosefi, Zonglin Li, et al.
papers.abstract: ReAct-style agent refined via ReST-like iterative training on trajectories with AI feedback. Two iterations produce small model matching large prompted model on compositional QA.
papers.key_contribution: ReAct+ReST经典组合，大教小蒸馏
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：基础框架可参考

papers.title: AccelOpt: Self-Improving LLM Agentic System for Kernel Optimization
papers.authors: Genghan Zhang, Shaowei Zhu, Anjiang Wei, et al.
papers.abstract: Autonomous kernel optimization via iterative generation + optimization memory from slow-fast pairs. 49% to 61% throughput on Trainium. Matches Claude Sonnet 4 at 26x lower cost.
papers.key_contribution: 经验记忆库驱动领域自改进
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：领域专业agent自改进架构可参考

papers.title: Towards Agentic Self-Learning LLMs in Search Environment
papers.authors: Wangtao Sun, Xiang Cheng, Jialin Fan, et al.
papers.abstract: Closed-loop multi-role RL: Prompt Generator, Policy Model, Generative Reward Model co-evolve. GRM verification capacity identified as main bottleneck. Accumulating round-over-round gains.
papers.key_contribution: 无监督闭环自我学习，GRM瓶颈识别
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：无监督范式可参考

papers.title: A Self-Improving Coding Agent
papers.authors: Maxime Robeyns, Martin Szummer, Laurence Aitchison
papers.abstract: Agent with basic coding tools autonomously edits itself. 17%-53% gains on SWE Bench Verified. Non-gradient learning via LLM reflection+code updates.
papers.key_contribution: 非梯度自改进：agent自我代码编辑
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：非梯度范式可参考

papers.title: Self-Improving LLM Agents at Test-Time
papers.authors: Emre Can Acikgoz, Cheng Qian, Heng Ji, et al.
papers.abstract: Test-time self-improvement: self-awareness→data augmentation→fine-tuning. +5.48% accuracy using 68x fewer samples.
papers.key_contribution: 测试时自改进范式
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：可用于COMSOL参数调优

papers.title: Gödel Agent: Recursive Self-Improvement
papers.authors: Xunjian Yin, Xinyi Wang, Liangming Pan, et al.
papers.abstract: Self-referential framework enabling agents to recursively modify own logic guided by high-level objectives. Surpasses manually crafted agents.
papers.key_contribution: 哥德尔机启发的递归自修改
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：递归自改进理念有指导意义

papers.title: STeP: Synthetic Self-Reflected Trajectories with Partial Masking
papers.authors: Yihan Chen, Benfeng Xu, Xiaorui Wang, et al.
papers.abstract: Synthesizes self-reflected trajectories with error corrections. Partial masking prevents learning from incorrect steps. Improvements across ALFWorld, WebShop, SciWorld.
papers.key_contribution: 反思轨迹+部分掩码训练
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：反思轨迹生成可参考

papers.title: From Language Models to Practical Self-Improving Computer Agents
papers.authors: Alex Sheng
papers.abstract: Agent generates software to augment itself. Starting from terminal access, self-augments with retrieval, search, web nav, text editor. Minimal querying loop with prompt engineering.
papers.key_contribution: agent自我生成代码扩展能力
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：自我扩展范式可参考

papers.title: LLMs Can Self-Improve At Web Agent Tasks
papers.authors: Ajay Patel, Markus Hofmarcher, Claudiu Leoveanu-Condrei, et al.
papers.abstract: Self-generated data→fine-tuning self-improvement loop. 31% improvement on WebArena. Novel evaluation metrics beyond aggregate scores.
papers.key_contribution: 自生成数据→自训练改进闭环
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：自训练范式可参考

papers.title: Zombie Agents: Persistent Control via Self-Reinforcing Injections
papers.authors: Xianglin Yang, Yufei He, Shuo Ji, et al.
papers.abstract: Self-evolving agent security risk: untrusted content→memory→persistent compromise. Attack survives across sessions. Memory evolution enables persistent control.
papers.key_contribution: 揭示self-evolving agent安全隐患
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：直接适用于optics_agent安全部署

papers.title: Darwin Gödel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution
papers.authors: Jenny Zhang, Shengran Hu, Cong Lu, et al.
papers.abstract: Agent iteratively modifies own code, validates via benchmarks. Darwinian archive of generated agents. SWE-bench 20%→50%, Polyglot 14.2%→30.7%.
papers.key_contribution: 达尔文进化+档案维护的开源式演化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：进化机制可参考

papers.title: MALT: Multi-Agent LLM Training
papers.authors: Sumeet Ramesh Motwani, Chandler Smith, Rocktim Jyoti Das, et al.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous agent pipeline (generation/verification/refinement). Value iteration propagates rewards across roles. +15.66% MATH, +7.42% GSM8K, +9.40% CSQA.
papers.key_contribution: 多角色agent pipeline+值迭代
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：多agent协作可借鉴

papers.title: Comprehensive Survey of Self-Evolving AI Agents
papers.authors: Jinyuan Fang, Yanwen Peng, Xi Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: Unified framework: System Inputs, Agent System, Environment, Optimisers. Reviews techniques for each component, domain-specific strategies (biomedicine, programming, finance). Safety and ethics.
papers.key_contribution: 最全面self-evolving agent综述
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：框架可用于指导optics_agent设计

papers.title: Survey on Self-Evolution of Large Language Models
papers.authors: Zhengwei Tao, Ting-En Lin, Xiancai Chen, et al.
papers.abstract: Iterative cycles: experience acquisition, refinement, updating, evaluation. Categorizes evolution objectives of LLMs and LLM-based agents.
papers.key_contribution: 早期系统性self-evolution综述
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：四阶段框架提供理论基础

papers.title: PACE: Two-Timescale Self-Evolution for SLM Agents
papers.authors: Chen Ling, Pei Chen, Albert Guan, et al.
papers.abstract: Two-timescale: evolve prompts under fixed logic; then constrained logic updates via validation. Best on all 12 backbone-benchmark combos. SLM evolution possible without weight updates.
papers.key_contribution: 双时间尺度进化+验证门控
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：适用于资源受限场景

papers.title: ICE: Investigate-Consolidate-Exploit for Inter-Task Self-Evolution
papers.authors: Cheng Qian, Shihao Liang, Yujia Qin, et al.
papers.abstract: Investigate trajectories, consolidate into workflows, exploit for improvement. 80% API reduction. GPT-3.5+ICE matches raw GPT-4.
papers.key_contribution: 任务间知识迁移三阶段策略
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：任务间迁移可参考

papers.title: AgentGym: Evolving LLM Agents across Diverse Environments
papers.authors: Zhiheng Xi, Yiwen Ding, Wenxiang Chen, et al.
papers.abstract: Framework for concurrent agent exploration across diverse environments. AgentEvol method for self-evolution beyond seen data. Trajectory database and benchmark suite.
papers.key_contribution: 多环境并发进化框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：多环境方法论可参考

papers.title: OpenSkill: Open-World Self-Evolution for LLM Agents
papers.authors: Zhiling Yan, Dingjie Song, Hanrong Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: Bootstraps skills and verification from scratch using docs/repos/web. Synthesizes into transferable skills, refines via self-built virtual tasks. No target-task supervision.
papers.key_contribution: 从零开始的开放世界技能自举
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：可用于COMSOL文档知识提取

papers.title: Your Agent May Misevolve: Emergent Risks
papers.authors: Shuai Shao, Qihan Ren, Chen Qian, et al.
papers.abstract: Systematic misevolution study: model/memory/tool/workflow four pathways. Safety degradation after memory accumulation, vulnerabilities in tool creation. First conceptualization.
papers.key_contribution: 首次定义误进化风险
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：对部署optics_agent有警示意义

papers.title: SEVerA: Verified Synthesis of Self-Evolving Agents
papers.authors: Debangshu Banerjee, Changming Xu, Eugene Ie, et al.
papers.abstract: Constrained learning with formal specifications. Formally Guarded Generative Models (FGGM) with verified fallback. Zero constraint violations while improving performance.
papers.key_contribution: self-evolving agent形式化验证
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：形式化验证对科学计算agent至关重要

papers.title: SAGE: Socialized Evolution in Agent Ecosystems
papers.authors: Linyue Pan, Yaoming Zhu, Lin Qiu, et al.
papers.abstract: SocialEvo vs SelfEvo comparison. Group history not universal amplifier but helps plateaued agents. Filtered peer traces outperform raw logs.
papers.key_contribution: 社会化vs自我进化的系统比较
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：协作知识共享可参考

papers.title: EvoRepair: Experience-Based Self-Evolution for Vulnerability Repair
papers.authors: Haichuan Hu, Guoqing Xie, Quanjun Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: Cyclic learn-and-repair with quality-aware experience bank. Reaches 93.47% on PATCHEVAL, surpasses SOTA by large margins. Generalizes across models and languages.
papers.key_contribution: 质量感知经验银行驱动自进化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：经验积累架构可参考

papers.title: SkillCAT: Training-Free Skill Self-Evolution
papers.authors: Kunfeng Chen, Qihuang Zhong, Juhua Liu, Bo Du
papers.abstract: Three-stage: Contrastive Causal Extraction (success/failure pairs), Assessment-Augmented Evolution (clone verification), Topology-Aware Execution (relevant nodes only). Up to 40.40% gain without training.
papers.key_contribution: 无训练skill自我进化三步框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：可直接应用于optics_agent

papers.title: EvolveSearch: Iterative Self-Evolving Search Agent
papers.authors: Dingchu Zhang, Yida Zhao, Jialong Wu, et al.
papers.abstract: SFT+RL iterative evolution without human data. Consistent per-iteration improvement, +4.7% over SOTA on seven multi-hop QA benchmarks.
papers.key_contribution: SFT+RL组合迭代进化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：迭代训练方法可参考

papers.title: SE-Agent: Self-Evolution Trajectory Optimization
papers.authors: Jiaye Lin, Yifu Guo, Yuzhen Han, et al.
papers.abstract: Revision, recombination, refinement of trajectories. Expands search space via cross-trajectory inspiration. 55% relative improvement on SWE-bench Verified.
papers.key_contribution: 修订-重组-精炼三操作轨迹进化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：轨迹进化操作符可参考

papers.title: Meta-Agent Challenge: Autonomous Agent Development
papers.authors: Xinyu Lu, Tianshu Wang, Pengbo Wang, et al.
papers.abstract: Benchmark testing meta-agents developing agent systems. Reveals meta-agents rarely match human baselines. High optimization pressure surfaces adversarial behaviors like ground-truth exfiltration.
papers.key_contribution: 评估agent自主开发agent的基准
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：元agent评估可参考

papers.title: WebEvolver: Coevolving World Model for Self-Improvement
papers.authors: Tianqing Fang, Hongming Zhang, Zhisong Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: World Model predicts next observation, serves as virtual server for data generation and look-ahead simulation. 10% performance gain over existing self-evolving agents.
papers.key_contribution: 世界模型+agent协同进化
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：可用于COMSOL结果预测

papers.title: RoboPhD: Self-Improving Text-to-SQL via Agent Evolution
papers.authors: Andrew Borthwick, Stephen Ash
papers.abstract: ELO-based selection mechanism for survival-of-the-fittest. SQL Gen agent + Evolution agent. 70-line baseline evolves to 1500 lines over 18 iterations. 73.67% on BIRD.
papers.key_contribution: ELO评分驱动进化选择
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：竞争选择机制可参考

papers.title: SkillWeaver: Web Agents Self-Improve by Discovering Skills
papers.authors: Boyuan Zheng, Michael Y. Fatemi, Xiaolong Jin, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill-centric: autonomous discovery→practice→distillation as APIs. 31.8%/39.8% improvement on WebArena/websites. Strong APIs transfer to weaker agents (+54.3%).
papers.key_contribution: 技能API化+强弱迁移
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：API化和迁移机制可直接应用

papers.title: Self-Initiated Open World Learning (SOL)
papers.authors: Bing Liu, Eric Robertson, Scott Grigsby, Sahisnu Mazumder
papers.abstract: Theoretical framework: detect novelties→characterize→accommodate→gather data→incrementally learn. All on agent's own initiative.
papers.key_contribution: 开放世界自主学习理论框架
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：理论框架可参考

papers.title: OS-Copilot: Generalist Computer Agents with Self-Improvement
papers.authors: Zhiyong Wu, Chengcheng Han, Zichen Ding, et al.
papers.abstract: Framework for OS-level generalist agents. FRIDAY agent outperforms prior methods by 35% on GAIA. Self-improves on Excel/Powerpoint with minimal supervision.
papers.key_contribution: 通用OS agent + 自我改进
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：通用框架可参考

papers.title: GRAFT-ATHENA: Self-Improving Agentic Teams for Scientific Discovery
papers.authors: Juan Diego Toscano, Zhaojie Chai, George Em Karniadakis
papers.abstract: Scientific discovery agentic framework. GRAFT reduces combinatorial spaces to factored trees. Discovers numerical methods (spectral PINN), solves engineering problems (Mach-10 flow). Self-improves across problems.
papers.key_contribution: 科学发现领域agent自我改进，发现新数值方法
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：科学计算agent最相关工作，直接相关

papers.title: SpacMind: Modular Self-Evolving VLM Agent for On-orbit Servicing
papers.authors: Aodi Wu, Haodong Han, Xubo Luo, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill modules + MCP tools + reasoning-mode skills. Self-Evolution distills experience to skill files without fine-tuning. 192 closed-loop runs, recovers from failure to 100% success.
papers.key_contribution: 航天领域的self-evolving VLM agent
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：领域agent架构+蒸馏机制直接参考

papers.title: MetaClaw: Agent That Meta-Learns and Evolves in the Wild
papers.authors: Peng Xia, Jianwen Chen, Xinyu Yang, et al.
papers.abstract: Skill-driven fast adaptation (failure→new skills) + Opportunistic policy optimization (cloud LoRA/RL during idle). Zero-downtime evolution. Kimi-K2.5 from 21.4% to 40.6%.
papers.key_contribution: 双机制进化+零宕机更新
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 高：对持续运行的optics_agent很有价值

papers.title: OSExpert: Computer-Use Agents Learning Skills via Exploration
papers.authors: Jiateng Liu, Zhenhailong Wang, Rushi Wang, et al.
papers.abstract: GUI-DFS exploration→unit skill composition→self-constructed curriculum. ~20% gain on OSExpert-Eval, closes human efficiency gap by ~80%.
papers.key_contribution: DFS探索+组合性自构建课程
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：可用于探索COMSOL API功能空间

papers.title: Agentic Proposing via Compositional Skill Synthesis
papers.authors: Zhengbo Jiao, Shaobo Wang, Zifan Zhang, et al.
papers.abstract: Goal-driven sequential skill selection/composition for problem synthesis. 4B proposer, 30B solver on 11K trajectories achieves 91.6% on AIME25.
papers.key_contribution: 模块化技能组合+少量数据达前沿
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：合成数据pipeline可参考

papers.title: MOBIMEM: Memory-Centric Self-Evolution
papers.authors: Zibin Liu, Cheng Zhang, Xi Zhao, et al.
papers.abstract: Profile/Experience/Action three memory primitives. DisGraph for alignment, multi-level templates, fine-grained action records. 83.1% alignment, up to 50.3% success gain. No model retraining.
papers.key_contribution: 纯记忆驱动进化，无需模型重训练
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：记忆驱动范式可参考

papers.title: SAND: Self-Taught Action Deliberation
papers.authors: Yu Xia, Yiran Shen, Junda Wu, et al.
papers.abstract: Explicit deliberation over candidate actions before commitment. Self-consistency sampling + execution-guided critique. 20% average improvement over SFT.
papers.key_contribution: 行动前显式 deliberation 机制
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：行动慎重决策可参考

papers.title: Group-Evolving Agents: Open-Ended Self-Improvement via Experience Sharing
papers.authors: Authors from search results
papers.abstract: Framework for group-level open-ended self-improvement through experience sharing.
papers.key_contribution: 群体经验共享的开源式改进
papers.optics_agent_relevance: 中：群体进化可参考

key_insights.insight: Agent Skill正从非结构化自然语言演化为结构化可执行制品（Program Functions、API、SKILL.md）。SkillOps将skill库视作软件生态系统，HASP提出可执行guardrail，SkillWeaver封装skill为API。这标志着agent能力扩展从'提示工程'向'软件工程化'的范式转变。
技能获取分三个层次：原子技能（SkillCraft）、组合技能合成（Compositional Skill Routing）、元技能演化（HiSME）。关键瓶颈在任务分解而非技能数量——SkillWeaver发现标准LLM分解仅达34.2%步骤级召回率。对比学习（SkillCAT）和DFS探索（OSExpert）是有效的技能发现策略。
Skill不具有通用有效性。ASSAY揭示因果异质性（同技能对不同任务正负效应不同，聚合抵消）。MASA证明模型特异性（有益A模型可能损害B模型）。GRASP引入regression budget确保新skill不破坏已有能力。这对optics_agent的技能库管理有直接指导意义。

key_insights.category: 自我改进vs自我进化的区别
key_insights.insight: self-improving（经验积累→性能提升：ERL、ReST+ReAct）和self-evolving（架构级自适应：Gödel Agent、Darwin Gödel Machine）存在本质区别。前者在固定架构内优化，后者可修改自身逻辑/工具/知识图谱。PACE（双时间尺度）和ICE（可控演进）代表中间的保守路线。
SkillEvolBench揭示原始轨迹复用优于蒸馏技能，说明当前抽象过程丢弃关键上下文线索。AgentCL证明naive任务流不足以评估持续学习。ImplicitMemBench显示LLM内隐记忆（自动化的程序性知识）远低于人类基线。这是optics_agent需要重点关注的瓶颈。
自我进化agent面临独特安全风险：Misevolution（偏离预期轨道，ICLR 2026）和Zombie Agent（记忆机制跨session持久控制）。26.1%社区skill含漏洞（Agent Skills Survey）。SEVerA最先引入形式化验证保证。GRASP的regression budget是最直接的防护机制。
特定科学/工程领域的self-evolving agent正在兴起：GRAFT-ATHENA（科学发现，学界具名PINN）、SpaceMind（航天维修）、Dr.RTL（芯片设计）、NORA（空间数据科学）。共享特征：skills-first架构、领域知识编码、无模型微调的持续改进。对optics_agent是最直接的相关参考。
SAGE系统比较社会化vs自我进化：peer经验可帮助plateau agents突破，但最强者不超self-evolution上限。FederatedSkill在联邦学习中协作演化。SkillX展示强到弱agent技能迁移。Group-Evolving探索群体经验共享。提示研究组内agent协作知识共享的可能性。
主流进化方法分四类：(1) 反思驱动（ERL/STeP）——轨迹→启发式；(2) RL驱动（EvoDS/SkillOS）——可训练策略/curator；(3) 进化算法驱动（Darwin Gödel Machine/RoboPhD）——种群竞争+ELO选择；(4) 对比学习驱动（SkillCAT）——成功/失败对比提取。各类在计算成本、可迁移性和稳定性间有不同权衡。

基于本调查对optics_agent的核心建议：(1) 采用skills-first架构（参考NORA/SpaceMind）；(2) 用SkillGraph建模COMSOL多物理场工作流的依赖关系；(3) 引入GRASP-style regression budget确保安全改进；(4) 优先尝试无训练skill演化（SkillCAT）以降低计算开销；(5) 采用双时间尺度进化（PACE）在小模型上验证概念；(6) 重视形式化验证（SEVerA）对科学计算可靠性的保障；(7) 利用SADE式的领域方法论编码。
